'''Gaeriel Capens''' was a [[Musician/Legends|musician]] during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. [[Gender/Legends|She]] was a member of the [[Melody Fellowship]].

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], it was revealed that her two latest hits, [[The Sequential Passage of Chronological Intervals/Legends|''The Sequential Passage of Chronological Intervals'']] and a remix of ''[[Shwock Dubllon]]'' (originally by [[Dembaline]]), were actually produced by [[RetSpan Audionics]] [[TribBot mimic series|TribBots]]. She also was a spokesperson for [[Lopez Drinks]].
